---
title: "Submission Tracker"
subtitle: "Status of all submitted papers"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

All paper submissions are listed below with their current status. Papers move through the pipeline from **Waiting** → **Running** → **Published** (or **Failed** / **Rejected**).

```{=html}
<style>
.status-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 2px 10px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #fff;
}
.status-published { background: #198754; }
.status-running   { background: #0d6efd; }
.status-waiting   { background: #6c757d; }
.status-failed    { background: #dc3545; }
.status-rejected  { background: #495057; }

.tracker-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}
.tracker-table th {
  background: #f8f9fa;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #dee2e6;
  padding: 0.6rem 0.8rem;
  text-align: left;
}
.tracker-table td {
  padding: 0.5rem 0.8rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
}
.tracker-table tr:hover {
  background: #f8f9fa;
}
</style>

<table class="tracker-table">
<thead>
<tr>
  <th>Paper</th>
  <th>Authors</th>
  <th>Journal / Year</th>
  <th>ID Strategy</th>
  <th>Method</th>
  <th>Status</th>
  <th>Notes</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
  <td>The Oregon Health Insurance Experiment</td>
  <td>Finkelstein et al.</td>
  <td>QJE 2012</td>
  <td>IV</td>
  <td>Causal Forest</td>
  <td><span class="status-badge status-published">Published</span></td>
  <td><a href="papers/finkelstein2012-cf/">View →</a></td>
</tr>
<tr>
  <td>The Oregon Health Insurance Experiment</td>
  <td>Finkelstein et al.</td>
  <td>QJE 2012</td>
  <td>IV</td>
  <td>DoubleML</td>
  <td><span class="status-badge status-published">Published</span></td>
  <td><a href="papers/finkelstein2012-dml/">View →</a></td>
</tr>
<tr>
  <td>Out of Africa: Genetic Diversity and Economic Development</td>
  <td>Ashraf, Galor</td>
  <td>AER 2013</td>
  <td>IV</td>
  <td>Causal Forest</td>
  <td><span class="status-badge status-published">Published</span></td>
  <td><a href="papers/ashraf2013-cf/">View →</a></td>
</tr>
<tr>
  <td>The Slave Trade and the Origins of Mistrust in Africa</td>
  <td>Nunn, Wantchekon</td>
  <td>AER 2011</td>
  <td>IV</td>
  <td>—</td>
  <td><span class="status-badge status-rejected">Not suitable</span></td>
  <td>Group-level treatment blocks individual-level CF/DML</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
```

---

### Status key

| Status | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| <span class="status-badge status-waiting">Waiting</span> | Submission received, not yet started |
| <span class="status-badge status-running">Running</span> | Pipeline is currently running |
| <span class="status-badge status-published">Published</span> | Successfully RECASTed — results available |
| <span class="status-badge status-failed">Failed</span> | Replication failed or pipeline encountered blocking issues |
| <span class="status-badge status-rejected">Not suitable</span> | Paper does not meet requirements (e.g., no public data, group-level treatment) |

---

[Submit a paper →](submit.qmd)

<!--
TO EMBED GOOGLE SHEET INSTEAD:
1. In Google Sheets: File → Share → Publish to web → Embed
2. Replace the HTML table above with:
   <iframe src="YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_EMBED_URL" width="100%" height="600" frameborder="0"></iframe>
This will auto-update when you edit the sheet.
-->
